_comment: Plain-language view of what Temo's AI skills know and how they evolve. No code. Refreshable.
intro: These are the reusable 'skills' your AI uses. The design builders aren't static — every time they draw frames in Figma they write a run-log and remember each screen's state, so next time they only touch what changed and get faster. Here's what each one knows and how it's growing.

skills.name: Tino Figma Builder
skills.role: Builds Tino + Tino Go screens in Figma from your Claude Design files.
skills.knows: Tino's design tokens, component kit, and the rules for handing a design off to be built (the DA→CL contract).
skills.learning: Newest of the three and the one you're actively teaching. It was ported from the proven Midas builder and is still being fitted to real Tino components — so right now it's literally learning Tino's kit and tokens as you run it.
skills.evolves: Each run logs what it built and saves every screen's state, so reruns skip unchanged screens and only build what's new.

skills.name: MMF Figma Builder
skills.role: Builds Money Market Fund screens (light + dark) in Figma.
skills.knows: MMF's light and dark tokens, components, and the same build-handoff contract.
skills.learning: Currently learning your dark-mode token set as you design it — once you approve the dark palette, it absorbs it and can convert screens in cheap batches.
skills.evolves: Same engine as Midas: remembers screen state between runs, rebuilds only what changed.

skills.name: Midas Figma Builder
skills.role: Builds Midas Finance + CarMax screens and decks in Figma.
skills.knows: Midas + CarMax tokens and components, and the full build pipeline — it's the original, proven one the others were copied from.
skills.learning: Mostly mature; it learns incrementally as Midas/CarMax components change.
skills.evolves: Keeps a build-state memory and a run history; only rebuilds changed screens.

skills.name: Canvas Design (Marketing)
skills.role: Designs posters, media kits, and marketing assets.
skills.knows: Layout and composition principles; pairs with Magnific for imagery.
skills.learning: Grows as you save winning layouts — each becomes a reusable template it can start from.
skills.evolves: Improves by template reuse rather than per-run state.
